Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Reigan Shen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Reigan Shen won the tournament and became a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen has recruited various groups to his cause.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Reigan Shen is the Emperor of Lions and Monarch of the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Reigan Shen is the creator of the Path of the King’s Key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Reigan Shen has gold-tinged white hair and a beard that blends into a white-gold mane.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen is working with the Dragon King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen bonded with a Sage's Remnant that had command over space when he was a Jade cub.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen's Path involves control over an extra-spatial vault used to store weapons, techniques, and enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen was born to a pride of regal white lions on the western plains of the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen reached Underlord before he turned twenty years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen was the victor of the first Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen is known as a conqueror, glory-seeker, imperialist, and daring innovator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen promised the four Dreadgod cults that he would awaken their masters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen is a person mentioned by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Reigan Shen is the Monarch of the King’s Key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Reigan Shen lounges on the roof of his palace.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen is a powerfully built man with a white-gold mane of hair and beard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen's invasion was prevented by Northstrider's support of Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen and his entire pedestal sank into the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan could not threaten Eithan directly due to his protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Therian Nills is a chosen of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Reigan Shen has a chance at Penance if Ziel loses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Reigan Shen wishes for the Dreadgods to invade the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Reigan Shen is involved in the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yan Shoumei is the chosen of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Reigan Shen has three Monarchs chosen from the Dreadgod cults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Dreadgod cultists' signature would be the white of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Reigan Shen once delivered a blow to Cladia that made her vanish from Eithan's senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Reigan Shen is a Monarch whom Min Shuei appealed to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Reigan Shen is someone the competitors aim to prove their value to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Ninecloud Court supports Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Reigan Shen paid for Eithan's expensive clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen may have gifted Calan Archer a spatial transfer artifact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Reigan Shen created a cloudship that can withstand attacks from anyone short of a Sage or a Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Reigan Shen is a missing provider of one of the seven prizes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Reigan Shen gave Sophara a clay doll that assists with form shifting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Reigan Shen is a Monarch who was sipping wine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Reigan Shen is the person Yan Shoumei is chosen by.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen watched from his viewing platform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Reigan Shen told the Blood Sage to ready themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen has mastery over spatial travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen promised to sponsor Eithan's advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Reigan Shen is binding the Dreadgod factions together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Reigan Shen began to tear open a portal from the heart of a mountain.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Reigan Shen is suspected of being behind the attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Reigan Shen is a person the Wei Patriarch of Lindon's memories gave a similar impression to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen is a person that could potentially push past Northstrider if carried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Reigan Shen made a specific teleportation anchor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Reigan Shen feels as weak as an Iron.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen is deep in the labyrinth and uses a drudge for his mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen is looking for ways deeper into the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen moved the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Reigan Shen uses a sword that blazes like the sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Reigan Shen coughed up blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Reigan Shen wears a human form like a cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Reigan Shen seized the Blood Core and placed it in a silver rectangular case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Reigan Shen carries a silver flask on his belt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Reigan Shen uses a construct at his belt that emanates blue strands of energy to support him in flight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Reigan Shen used a flight construct to travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Reigan Shen is a person who might value the ivory box as a Soulsmithing tool.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Reigan Shen is approaching the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Reigan Shen carries two swords, one large and orange, and one thin as a needle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Reigan Shen has a lens covering his left eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Reigan Shen raised his sword toward Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen was targeted by a rain of stars called by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen's eyes flash gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen is cut off from his supply of weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen is a Monarch who desires weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen wants Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen sees the Dreadgods as a way to take Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Reigan Shen is notorious for playing with his prey.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Reigan Shen is someone Lindon might have to confront again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Reigan Shen had a death trident consisting of two broken halves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Subject One welcomed Reigan Shen with open arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Subject One chose Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Reigan Shen is the patron of the Dreadgod cults in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Reigan Shen carries loot perfect for any Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen is believed to have slain the beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen called for Wei Shi Lindon Arelius to have a seat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen is a Monarch who can pull a golden chair out of thin air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen is a Monarch who rules over an ancient and ruined kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen possesses an axe of weathered stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen's spiritual pressure is comparable to a Herald, but he is spiritually weaker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen possesses Tiberian Arelius’ Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen uses a Striker technique of sword madra from an Archlord weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen is the sole Monarch of the Rosegold continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen wants the Dreadgods, the Monarchs, their people, and their Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen uses a Forged silver shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen absorbed the Soulsmith inheritance of Ozmanthus Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen holds the core binding of Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Reigan Shen possesses a lion form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Reigan Shen possesses soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Reigan Shen and his Sages had their spirits unveiled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Reigan Shen arranged something within the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Reigan Shen hired the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Something happened with Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon ejected Reigan Shen's forces from the valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Reigan Shen has no skill at reading Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Reigan Shen is a man who reacts to the arrival of the Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen realized he had slain Eithan's descendants.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen may have obtained some prototype arrowheads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Reigan Shen can change his resources at any time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen is the Lion Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen wears silver-and-gold armor and uses Monarch-level launchers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen possesses hunger madra that was sealed in a scripted and space-locked container.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Malice compares the Silent King to Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Reigan Shen is a lion taking on the tiger's share of the burden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Reigan Shen hovered nearby watching the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Reigan Shen had a first collection of relics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen has an isolated space that resembles his treasure vaults.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen's signet ring represents wealth and command over space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen does not perform his own Soulsmithing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Reigan Shen uses gold-edged portals to unleash Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Reigan Shen uses four shields that orbit him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Reigan Shen uses a King’s Key to call out defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Reigan can drag out time for a human spent outside of the pocket world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon had driven off Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Reigan Shen stays away out of fear of the Silent King Bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Reigan Shen returned to a spatial anchor just outside of Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Reigan Shen was struck by a bar of liquid flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Reigan Shen used a trio of blue-and-green metal claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Reigan Shen is capable of blowing Sacred Valley to ashes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Reigan Shen's vaults were torn apart by the technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Reigan Shen was struck by a projection of Ozmanthus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Reigan Shen's hunger echoes were used to fend off Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Reigan Shen was approaching Windfall using King's Key madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin remembers Reigan Shen's face from the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Reigan Shen found the location/group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Reigan Shen used a whip made of life madra to shred a plague-spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Reigan Shen is one of Yerin's targets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Reigan Shen gifted Yerin her wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Silent King Bow is worthy of Reigan Shen's collection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan is a character who can use spiritual sense to perceive the agony of a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan has the ability to expand a Remnant's physical form for inspection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen is the full name of Reigan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Reigan Shen helped to seal Emriss Silentborn away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Reigan Shen carries the Horn of the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Reigan Shen has authority over the core binding of the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Reigan Shen explored the labyrinth and extracted its binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Reigan Shen lowered the binding of Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen's home is Rosegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen has a territory to the south.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen uses a two-handed sword that runs with blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen pounced on Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Reigan Shen uses hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Reigan Shen is working with Sha Miara to protect Rosegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Reigan Shen was facing down three additional Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Reigan Shen was building a home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Reigan Shen possesses King’s Key madra.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen witnessed Monarchs battling the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen swallowed a Sage's spirit during his advancement to Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen possesses a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is a character who possesses the Path of the King's Key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is an Underlord of the Rosegold plains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is a member of House Gray.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen has a Sage's Remnant bonded to him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen can move space intuitively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is a member of a species that has natural gifts and madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is of House Gray.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is one of the eight Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen's advancement to Underlord was aided by the elders of his kind and shared bloodline power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is a fighter who was not favored to win his match against Tiberian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen has a more powerful body and soul in terms of madra potency than Tiberian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen advanced to the Overlord stage during the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is a member of House Gray.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is a member of House Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen is an Overlord and a sacred lion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Reigan Shen competed in the first Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen is described as Eithan's family's killer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Reigan Shen is currently weakened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Reigan Shen is a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Reigan Shen fought in the first Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Reigan Shen is planning to assassinate Lindon's friends.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
